name: Possible Deobfuscation And Reflective Injection From AMSI
description: Adversaries may reflectively load code into a process in order to conceal the execution of malicious payloads. Reflective loading involves allocating then executing payloads directly within the memory of the process.

filterSets.name: Deobfuscation And Reflective Injection Via PowerShell
PowerShell Deobfuscation And Reflective Injection via Registry

author: Abdelrahman Esmail
